warnings: Stale candidate pressure is an MET observation only. EVL/CDE/SEL/GOV remain canonical owners; this record never claims closure or owner adoption.
Items with unknown age remain unknown; never substituted with 0.
failure_prevented: Stale MET candidates accumulating without a visible pressure metric, causing recommendations to silently rot in the queue with no owner-handoff readiness signal.
signal_improved: Stale candidate pressure is surfaced per loop leg with the count of items past their stale window, the age distribution, and the next recommended input to refresh the signal.

pressure_summary.stale_threshold_observation: Items past stale_after_days surface as stale_candidate_signal in the closure ledger.

pressure_by_loop_leg.next_recommended_input: Forward EVC-EVL-* candidates to EVL for owner artifact retrieval.
